content: JUCE AudioProcessor::setLatencySamples(int) sets internal latencySamples and calls updateHostDisplay with latencyChanged=true so hosts can apply PDC. Call from prepareToPlay when latency is known; may call again when latency changes (e.g. sample rate). setLatencySamples does not delay audio inside processBlock—the host delays other tracks. Override processBlockBypassed to match latency when bypassed. VST3 historically ignored setLatencySamples during prepareToPlay but JUCE fixed this.
